/usr/bin/c++  -DBOOST_HAS_THREADS -DCGAL_HAS_THREADS -DCGAL_DONT_USE_LAZY_KERNEL -DUSE_GPU -g CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/mytest/face_classifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/mytest/test_face_classifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_aabb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_decomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_hausdorff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_retrieve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_skeleton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/himesh_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/spatial/spatial_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/geometry/TriInt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/geometry/computing_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/storage/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/storage/tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/storage/tile_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/index/octree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/face_classifier.dir/index/stree.cpp.o -o face_classifier  -lgmp -lmpfr -lpthread -lcuda /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
